codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature requirements: recipes are scoped to the authenticated user and ordered by newest first, title search is case-insensitive on the client, empty/no-results states are implemented, detail rendering includes required sections with conditional Thermomix rendering, and delete flow uses confirmation + ownership-checked deletion with redirect.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Middleware location was unclear during implementation: worker first looked for `middleware.ts` at repo root and then had to discover it under `src/`. If `src/middleware.ts` is the project convention, documenting that explicitly could reduce friction.

The fullstack-worker procedure requires agent-browser manual verification, but this mission environment has recurring Clerk headless/bot-protection limitations that prevent full authenticated UI verification. Skill guidance could include an explicit fallback path for protected-route features.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff interactive check only confirms redirect to `/sign-in`; transcript notes inability to complete authenticated browser validation due Clerk bot protection.

summary: PASS — no blocking or non-blocking code defects found in this feature’s implementation; behavior and data-access constraints align with the feature contract.
